seoTitle: Henderson County Schools KY Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
seoDescription: View Henderson County Schools KY Calendar 2026-2027 with first day, last day, holidays, fall break, winter break, spring break dates, PDF and calendar download options.
calendarNotes: Henderson County Schools in Kentucky starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 13, 2026 and ends on May 25, 2027. Fall Break runs October 5-9, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs April 5-9. The calendar also lists professional development days, election days, holidays, possible make-up days, closing day for staff, Memorial Day, and school hours.

customSections.label: About Henderson County Schools District
customSections.content: Henderson County Schools is a public school district located in Henderson County, Kentucky, serving students from preschool through high school. The district publishes annual academic calendars for families, staff, and community planning. This page summarizes districtwide student dates from the official HCS calendar, including the first day of school, holidays, fall break, winter break, spring break, professional development days, election day no-school dates, possible make-up days, and PDF or calendar download options.

customSections.label: Henderson County Schools Break Length Summary
customSections.content: Break lengths help families estimate childcare, travel windows, and work schedule changes. These ranges summarize the major Henderson County Schools KY breaks listed on the 2026-2027 calendar.

rows: Five weekdays away from regular classes.

customSections.label: Planning Around the Henderson County Schools Calendar
customSections.content: The Henderson County Schools 2026-2027 academic calendar is most useful when families treat it as a planning checklist, not only a list of dates. Parents can use the first student day to finalize transportation, morning routines, before-school care, and after-school pickup plans. Fall Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break are the main travel windows, while professional development days, election day closures, and possible make-up days are the dates most likely to affect childcare or work schedules. The official PDF is also helpful for families coordinating appointments, sports practices, club meetings, and summer camp registration because it shows the school-year boundaries and major no-school periods in one place. For working parents, the highest-impact dates are usually the staff-only professional development days, election day closures, and late-year make-up windows because those dates can change daily routines even when they are not long breaks. Families with athletes, preschool students, or school-specific activities should also watch campus announcements because those schedules may not appear in the districtwide calendar PDF.

groups.label: Family planning uses
items: Use Fall Break, Winter Break, and Spring Break to plan trips, appointments, and extended childcare coverage.
Review professional development and staff-only dates separately because students typically do not attend on those days.
Check possible make-up days before booking late-winter or late-May travel.

groups.label: Before finalizing plans
items: Check whether a listed date is a student holiday, professional development day, election day, break period, or possible make-up day.
Confirm weather-related make-up decisions with Henderson County Schools before booking travel near February, March, or late May make-up windows.
Use campus announcements for preschool schedules, athletics, transportation changes, graduation events, and school-specific activities.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Henderson County Schools start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day for students is Thursday, August 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Henderson County Schools Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, April 5 through Friday, April 9, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Henderson County Schools in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Tuesday, May 25, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Henderson County Schools close for Election Day in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 calendar lists November 3, 2026 and May 18, 2027 as Election Day no-school dates.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break for Henderson County Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Henderson County Schools have fall break?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Henderson County Schools Fall Break is scheduled for October 5-9, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school end in Henderson County KY in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for Henderson County Schools students is Tuesday, May 25, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in the Henderson County Schools 2026-2027 calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: This page summarizes the published Henderson County Schools KY calendar dates. Families who need the official instructional-day count should confirm attendance totals directly with Henderson County Schools.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can parents download the HCS calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the official PDF link on this page to view the published Henderson County Schools 2026-2027 academic calendar PDF.

calendarFaqs.q: Is this Henderson County Schools calendar updated for 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. This page is based on the 2026-2027 Henderson County Schools Kentucky calendar source checked by MySchoolDates on July 21, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: Are there teacher work days in Henderson County Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 Henderson County Schools calendar lists professional development days and staff-only dates. Students typically do not attend on those dates unless the district announces a make-up schedule or school-specific exception.
